name: testcase-manager
description: A comprehensive test case management system for software quality assurance
author: TestCase Manager Team

scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:web && npm run build:api
scripts.build:web: cd apps/web && npm run build 2>&1 | tee ../../logs/build-web_$(date +%Y-%m-%d).log
scripts.build:api: cd services/api && npm run build 2>&1 | tee ../../logs/build-api_$(date +%Y-%m-%d).log
scripts.dev: npm run build && concurrently "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web" 2>&1 | tee logs/dev_$(date +%Y-%m-%d).log
scripts.dev:api: cd services/api && npm run dev 2>&1 | tee ../../logs/dev-api_$(date +%Y-%m-%d).log
scripts.dev:web: cd apps/web && npm run dev 2>&1 | tee ../../logs/dev-web_$(date +%Y-%m-%d).log
scripts.test: npm run build && cd packages/git-core && npm test 2>&1 | tee ../../logs/test_$(date +%Y-%m-%d).log
